title: Qlog Baseline Implementation Lane
summary: Coordinate the qlog v1 implementation baseline and keep the contained JSON core, sequential JSON Text Sequences writer, and QUIC vocabulary slices aligned to the requirement corpus.
planned_changes: Stand up the `Incursa.Qlog` core types and `Incursa.Qlog.Serialization.Json` writer boundaries, keep protocol-specific QUIC vocabulary in `Incursa.Qlog.Quic`, expose the contained and sequential serializer string and Stream entry points, and add the three QUIC event-family slices there while keeping non-JSON formats outside the current baseline.
out_of_scope: HTTP/3 adapters in the first baseline.
Non-JSON sinks or transport layers that are not required by the draft source material.
Additional non-JSON serialization formats beyond contained JSON and sequential JSON Text Sequences.
Large work-item backlogs, phase prompts, or chunk-manifest machinery.
Fake completeness or fabricated verification evidence.
verification_plan: Use slice-specific unit, contract, and snapshot tests for the core model, sequential serializer, and QUIC vocabulary families, and keep the umbrella SpecTrace validation script in the loop.
